    (lstm): LSTM(2, 61, num_layers=2, batch_first=True)
  )
  (hidden_dense): HiddenDense(
    (fc1): Linear(in_features=223, out_features=104, bias=True)
  )
  (output_dense): OutputDense(
    (fc): Linear(in_features=104, out_features=200, bias=True)
  )
)
